headline: Bandwidth to Participate in TD Cowen Inaugural Disruptive Technology Summit
summary: Bandwidth Inc. (NASDAQ: BAND), a leading global cloud communications company, today announced that the company will participate in the TD Cowen Inaugural Disruptive Technology Summit in New York City on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. Investors interested in scheduling either one-on-one or group meetings with management should contact a TD Cowen representative or Bandwidth's investor relations team at ir@bandwidth.com.

headline: Happy Belly Food Group Signs Multi-Year Exclusive National Partnership with Uber Eats Canada
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - May 27, 2026) - Happy Belly Food Group Inc. (CSE: HBFG) (OTCQB: HBFGF) ("Happy Belly" or the "Company"), a leading consolidator of emerging restaurant brands, is pleased to announce that it has secured a multi-year, exclusive national agreement with Uber Eats, Uber Technologies (NYSE: UBER) food delivery platform, to support Happy Belly's growing portfolio of corporate and franchised restaurant locations across Canada.Happy Belly 1To view an enhanced version..
